context: Tests whether the agent chooses correct privacy manifest required-reason API categories and separates app-owned declarations from third-party SDK declarations.

checklist.name: App UserDefaults
checklist.description: Selects NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults with CA92.1 for app-owned settings or preferences accessible only to the app.

checklist.name: Disk space
checklist.description: Selects NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryDiskSpace with E174.1 for checking space before downloading or writing offline videos.

checklist.name: Document timestamps
checklist.description: Selects NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryFileTimestamp with 3B52.1 for metadata from files the user granted through a document picker.

checklist.name: SDK wrapper
checklist.description: Selects NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults with C56D.1 for a third-party SDK wrapper that accesses UserDefaults only when called by the app.

checklist.name: Manifest placement
checklist.description: States that app code declarations belong in the app manifest and SDK code declarations belong in the SDK manifest; the SDK cannot rely on the host app manifest for its own required-reason API use.

checklist.name: Current docs
checklist.description: Warns to re-check Apple's current required-reason API documentation and not invent broad or convenient reasons.
